description_long: This object is a mechanical glove or gauntlet, designed with a robust, armored appearance. The main body is constructed from reddish-brown metal plates, with articulated finger segments and reinforced knuckles, suggesting durability and protection. Blue cylindrical elements and metallic accents are integrated along the sides, possibly for decorative or functional purposes. The wrist area features a prominent circular metallic detail, and the palm and back of the hand are reinforced with additional plating. The interior is hollow, indicating it is meant to be worn over a hand or prosthetic. The surface shows signs of wear and weathering, giving it a rugged, utilitarian look suitable for urban or industrial environments.
description: A rugged, armored mechanical glove with reddish-brown metal plating, blue accents, and articulated fingers, designed for protection and utility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the articulated fingers, reinforced knuckles, and detailed plating on the back of the hand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue cylindrical elements, metallic wrist detail, and the layered construction of the glove.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the hollow interior and the circular opening for inserting a hand or prosthetic.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the large circular metallic detail at the wrist and the overall length of the glove.
